items.title: Requirements Engineering
items.subtitle: GenAI-assisted requirements workflows and practical methods
items.summary: A focused project page on requirements engineering methods and practices for software development.
items.overview: Requirements engineering is the process of defining, documenting, and maintaining requirements in the engineering design process. It is a common role in systems engineering and software engineering. It aims to enhance software quality, reduce development costs and time, and improve communication and change management capabilities within the team.
items.bodyHtml:
Requirements engineering is the process of defining, documenting, and maintaining requirements in the engineering design process. It is a common role in systems engineering and software engineering. It aims to enhance software quality, reduce development costs and time, and improve communication and change management capabilities within the team.

The project page collects demos, notes, and project-specific resources around GenAI-assisted requirements workflows.

items.title: Deepfake Speech
items.subtitle: Detection and analysis of synthetic speech signals
items.summary: Research and resources related to deepfake speech generation and detection, including demos and publications.
items.overview: Deepfake speech is a product of artificial intelligence used to create convincing speech sentences that sound like specific people saying things they did not say.
items.bodyHtml:
Deepfake speech is a product of artificial intelligence used to create convincing speech sentences that sound like specific people saying things they did not say.

The project page brings together the detection work, supporting materials, and publication links in a more compact format.
